signin.title: Sign In to Continue
signin.body: Upload once, keep forever. Your Document Vault lives here.
upgrade.title: Upload once. Keep forever.
upgrade.body: The Document Vault is a Pro feature: a permanent, organized store for every passport, bank statement, and certificate you'll ever need for a visa application.
add.title: Add a document
add.label: Label
add.upload_cta: Choose a file (JPG, PNG, or PDF, up to 50MB)
cat.identity_hint: Passport copies, national ID, birth certificate
cat.employment_hint: Offer letters, employer letters, business registration
cat.legal_hint: Police clearances, court orders, refusal letters
cat.medical_hint: Health insurance, vaccination records, medical certificates
cat.other_hint: Invitation letters, accommodation proofs, anything else
toast.label_required: Give this document a label first (e.g. "UK Passport").
toast.bad_type: Please upload a JPG, PNG, WEBP, or PDF file.
toast.upload_error: Failed to upload. Please try again.
toast.reminder_set: Reminder set — we'll email you before it expires.
toast.reminder_error: Could not set a reminder for this document.
toast.expiry_error: Could not update the expiry date.
